title: (Fake) Hardcore
description: (Fake) Hardcore is a server-sided Fabric mod that re-imagines Minecraft’s hardcore mode by allowing operators to revive players instead of permanently banning them.
body:
# (Fake) Hardcore

**(Fake) Hardcore** is a server-sided Fabric mod that re-imagines Minecraft's hardcore mode by allowing operators to revive players instead of permanently banning them.  
When a player "dies", **they don't actually respawn** or get kicked. Instead, they are switched into **spectator mode**, keeping the hardcore feel but giving admins **the power to bring them back.**

This mod is perfect for multiplayer survival servers that want the tension of hardcore without the frustration of losing progress forever.

---

## Features

### ⚰️ True Hardcore Feel
Players die as usual, drop items and experience, but can no longer interact with the world.  
The mod fully uses Minecraft’s built-in **Hardcore** mode _(`hardcore=true`)_, meaning the world is locked to Hard difficulty and players cannot respawn normally, keeping the authentic hardcore experience intact.

### 👁️ Spectator Lock
Upon death, players are automatically switched to spectator mode, unable to move.

### 🧠 Admin Revival System
Server operators can "/revive" fallen players, restoring their gameplay without restarting the world. _(Combine this with a hard challenge or even a donation so players will think twice about dying next time)_

### 🔊 Thunder Death Effect
A global thunder sound is played upon death to alert everyone.

### 💬 Broadcast Death Message
Other players see the cause of death (for example: "Player was blown up by a Creeper").

### ⚙️ Fully Server-Sided
No client installation required. Players only need to join the server to use the mod.

---

## Compatibility

- ✅ Works with Minecraft 1.21.9 and 1.21.10  
- ✅ Requires Fabric API  
- ✅ Server-side only (clients do not need to install it)

---

## Questions / Bug Reporting

Found a bug, want to request a feature, or suggest improvements?  
Join the Discord linked on the Modrinth page!
